mapper.select: SELECT * FROM biz_payment_record WHERE tenant_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_time DESC
SELECT * FROM biz_payment_record WHERE payment_no = #{orderNo} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) FROM biz_payment_record WHERE status = 1 AND DATE_FORMAT(payment_time, '%Y-%m') = #{month} AND deleted = 0
